scenarios.reason: Operating system RHEL 7 is EOL and should be moved to a supported baseline.

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch to standard Linux Operating System
scenarios.reason: RHEL 7 is already a Linux-based operating system.
The application has cloud or container portability characteristics that make ARM migration feasible.
Application server Payara 4.0 is EOL and should be replaced or upgraded.

scenarios.scenario_name: Application Migration to Cloud Infrastructure (Lift & Shift)
scenarios.reason: The application is already fully deployed in AWS.
The recorded architecture (3-Tier) suggests a layered or monolithic design suitable for decoupling.
Database engine SQL Server 2019 is current.
SQL Server 2019 is not a managed database service and could be moved to a managed offering.
A managed database move would also enable ARM-based managed database optimization.
Serverless database migration is targeted at cloud workloads with database sizes below 100GB.
SQL Server 2019 is a candidate for PostgreSQL standardization to reduce license and platform cost.
